name: marp-neobrutalism
description: Marp theme in the neobrutalist style: thick borders, offset shadows, flat fills, bold grotesque type.

scripts.example: npx @marp-team/marp-cli --allow-local-files --config .marprc.js examples/deck.md -o examples/deck.html && npx @marp-team/marp-cli --allow-local-files --config .marprc.js examples/deck.md -o examples/deck.pdf && npx @marp-team/marp-cli --allow-local-files --config .marprc.js examples/deck.md -o examples/deck.pptx

author: Adam Munawar Rahman
